title: Money in the room, like a calm dog at your feet
subtitle: A visualisation for building the felt experience of money as a stable, non-threatening presence.
excerpt: A short visualisation practice for Day 21 of the MONEY program. Use to build a new body-memory of money as something that can sit with you quietly without requiring constant management.
sourceNotes: Original to homemade.education as a companion visualisation for Day 21 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

content.text: A five-minute visualisation for Day 21 of the MONEY program. The image is domestic: money, in the room with you, like a dog that has settled at your feet. Not a threat. Not requiring anything from you. Just present.
Sit comfortably. Close your eyes or soften your gaze. Three slow breaths.
Picture yourself in a room you know well, your kitchen, your sitting room. You're settled: in a chair, on the sofa, at the table. The room is quiet.

Now picture money in the room with you. Picture it as an animal, specifically, a calm, well-fed dog that has come to rest at your feet. Not demanding attention. Not pacing. Just there, breathing slowly, weight on the floor.

You don't need to do anything with the dog. You don't need to feed it, train it, or keep it from leaving. It's settled. It chose to be here. You're reading, or drinking your tea, and the dog is at your feet.
Stay in the picture for a minute. Let your shoulders drop. Let the room be quiet. Money is in the room. Nothing bad is happening.
Original to homemade.education. A companion visualisation for Day 21 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program by Rebecca J Page.
